# Beardy — Markdown Editor for macOS

> Beardy is a native macOS markdown editor for developers and technical writers.
> Author: Konstantin Shkurko (Константин Шкурко).

## Canonical

- Product: Beardy
- Platform: macOS (native SwiftUI + CodeMirror)
- Website languages: English, Russian, German, French, Spanish

## Key pages

- Home (EN): /en/
- User guide (EN): /en/guide.html
- Home (RU): /ru/
- User guide (RU): /ru/guide.html
- Home (DE): /de/
- Home (FR): /fr/
- Home (ES): /es/

## Features (summary)

- Four editor modes: Edit, Live, Split, Preview
- Syntax highlighting, outline navigation, synced scroll
- KaTeX math and Mermaid diagrams (offline bundled)
- Custom themes (light/dark families)
- Export: HTML, PDF, PNG, DOCX, EPUB (Pandoc where applicable)
- Multi-tab documents, auto-save, undo/redo across modes
- Spell check, smart typography options (configurable)

## Author

Konstantin Shkurko — software developer, creator of Beardy.

## License / contact

Update contact URL in sitemap and footer when publishing.
